title: Teams chat (Operations) — 2025-11 job schedule
body:
Channel: Operations

[2025-11-21 08:00] Nadia Carr: November 2025 dispatch list: job_000209 — Oak Street Mechanical, repair, $293.94; job_000207 — Carlos Byrd, install, $441.65.
[2025-11-21 08:05] Anthony Ellis: Adding job_000202 — Anthony Gomez, repair, $294.11, and job_000216 — Cole Family Hospitality, install, $441.65.
[2025-11-21 08:10] Nadia Carr: Also on the list: job_000203 — Sagebrush Properties, repair, $587.89.
[2025-11-21 08:15] Anthony Ellis: Final entry is job_000218 — Greenfield Properties, install, $883.30.
[2025-11-21 08:20] Nadia Carr: Jared Hale is listed with Operations for the 2025 schedule.
[2025-11-21 08:25] Anthony Ellis: I have all six job IDs, customers, service types, and amounts recorded for November 2025.
[2025-11-21 08:30] Nadia Carr: Great, that covers the repair and install work on this dispatch list.
[2025-11-21 08:35] Anthony Ellis: Confirmed for the channel record.
